top_signals.title: Ecolab Raises $5 Billion to Fund Firm’s Purchase of CoolIT
top_signals.summary: Ecolab Inc. priced $5 billion of investment-grade bonds to help finance its pending takeover of CoolIT Systems Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Long-running conflicts muddy Democratic Republic of Congo’s Ebola response
top_signals.summary: The outbreak's epicenter is in a border province where the violence wrought by various armed groups has led to intense episodes of internal displacement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
